insights.anomalies: All ads are dated to 2026, which is in the future, indicating a potential data entry error or system glitch. The absence of recent events (0 signals) despite a massive ad launch raises questions about tracking accuracy or campaign transparency.
insights.monthly_trends: No historical data is available for monthly trends due to the absence of ads older than 7 days. The sudden influx of ads may indicate a structural shift in advertising priorities or a time-sensitive campaign.
insights.predicted_opportunities: Prioritize verticals with the highest ad volume: education, health, and home_improvement. Explore angles related to electrician services and home improvement (e.g., mini gardens) due to their repeated emphasis in long-running ads.
insights.today_moves: No new ads were launched in the last 24 hours, indicating no recent changes to the campaign strategy. All active ads (560) were newly created within the past 7 days, suggesting a sudden and significant ad launch.
insights.weekly_patterns: A sharp acceleration in ad activity this week, with all 560 ads being newly launched. This suggests a coordinated campaign rollout or a response to an urgent market opportunity.
